name: Nomic Embed (Open Embedding Model)
pricing_notes: nomic-embed-text-v1: open weights (Apache 2.0); API: free tier then $0.10/1M tokens

auth.notes: Nomic API key; open-weights model available for self-hosting

agent_readiness.notes: nomic-embed-text-v1.5 and v2: state-of-the-art open-weights embedding models. Matryoshka embeddings (variable dimension: 64-768). Long-context (8192 tokens). Multimodal (nomic-embed-vision). Competes with OpenAI text-embedding-3-small at fraction of cost. Open weights (Apache 2.0) — self-host for zero cost. Also: Nomic Atlas for data visualization and exploration. Available via Nomic API, Ollama, sentence-transformers, LangChain, LlamaIndex.

gotchas: Smaller company vs OpenAI/Cohere — API reliability less proven at scale
Open weights require GPU for self-hosted performance
Matryoshka requires downstream task tuning for optimal dimension
best_when: High-quality embeddings with Apache 2.0 open weights for self-hosting
Long-context embeddings (8192 tokens vs 8192 for OpenAI)
RAG pipelines wanting open-weight alternative to OpenAI embeddings
Cost-conscious teams (open weights = zero API cost self-hosted)
avoid_when: When OpenAI embedding compatibility or ecosystem is required
CPU-only self-hosting (use Kokoro/piper size models instead)
summary: nomic-embed-text provides state-of-the-art open-weights (Apache 2.0) embedding models. Matryoshka embeddings (variable dimensions), 8192-token context. Competes with OpenAI text-embedding-3-small. Self-host for zero cost or use Nomic API. Available via Ollama, sentence-transformers, LangChain. Best for RAG pipelines wanting open-weight high-quality embeddings without OpenAI dependency.
